tool_args.label: Petroleum Business Tax unfavorable accrual variance - timing
tool_args.raw_text: The unfavorable accrual variances for the month and year-to-date were due primarily to timing of booking accruals by MTA Accounting.

payload.claim_text: The unfavorable accrual variances for the month and year-to-date were due primarily to timing of booking accruals by MTA Accounting.
payload.subject: Petroleum Business Tax (PBT)

tool_args.label: Urban Tax favorable variance - commercial real estate transactions
tool_args.raw_text: The favorable variances for the month and year-to-date were primarily due to higher-than-expected commercial real estate transactions in New York City.

payload.claim_text: The favorable variances for the month and year-to-date were primarily due to higher-than-expected commercial real estate transactions in New York City.
payload.subject: Urban Tax

tool_args.label: Payroll Mobility Tax month unfavorable, YTD favorable
tool_args.raw_text: Payroll Mobility Tax transactions were below the forecast for the month; year-to-date transactions were favorable due primarily to higher-than-forecasted transactions.

payload.claim_text: Payroll Mobility Tax transactions were below the forecast for the month; year-to-date transactions were favorable due primarily to higher-than-forecasted transactions.
payload.subject: Payroll Mobility Tax (PMT)

tool_args.label: CBDTP Capital Lockbox funds retained for debt service
tool_args.raw_text: The July Plan assumed that beginning in April 2021, a portion of the funds earmarked for the CBDTP Capital Lockbox would be retained in the operating budget to cover debt service costs, however the funds are being retained until the end of the year.

payload.claim_text: The July Plan assumed that beginning in April 2021, a portion of the funds earmarked for the CBDTP Capital Lockbox would be retained in the operating budget to cover debt service costs, however the funds are being retained until the end of the year.
payload.subject: Less: Transfer to CBDTP Capital Lockbox

tool_args.label: B&T Operating Surplus Transfer favorable - higher toll revenues, lower expenses
tool_args.raw_text: The favorable variances for the month and year-to-date were due to higher than forecast toll revenues and lower expenses.

payload.claim_text: The favorable variances for the month and year-to-date were due to higher than forecast toll revenues and lower expenses.
payload.subject: B&T Operating Surplus Transfer

tool_args.label: MTA Aid above forecast due to timing of accruals
